params.label: Population A
params.tip: The A cells to annotate — for each, the nearest B cell by SURFACE distance. One segmentation (its cells get the contact annotations).

params.label: Population B (target)
params.tip: The target population within segmentation B.

params.label: Contact distance (µm)
params.tip: Surface-to-surface distance (microns) at or below which an A cell counts as in contact with B. Mesh route — accurate for large/live cells; slower than the points route (meshes built on the fly per timepoint).
